# Noto Sans font manifest (one representative family per script category)
# Download manually; place fonts under tests/fixtures/scripts/fonts/
# Sources: https://www.google.com/get/noto/ or https://github.com/googlefonts/noto-fonts

Simple LTR:
- Noto Sans (Latin, Cyrillic, Greek)
- Noto Sans Georgian

Complex Indic:
- Noto Sans Devanagari
- Noto Sans Bengali
- Noto Sans Tamil
- Noto Sans Telugu
- Noto Sans Kannada
- Noto Sans Malayalam

Southeast Asian:
- Noto Sans Balinese
- Noto Sans Javanese
- Noto Sans Sundanese
- Noto Sans Batak
- Noto Sans Thai
- Noto Sans Lao
- Noto Sans Khmer
- Noto Sans Myanmar

RTL:
- Noto Sans Arabic
- Noto Sans Hebrew
- Noto Sans Syriac
- Noto Sans Thaana
- Noto Sans NKo

CJK:
- Noto Sans CJK SC (Simplified)
- Noto Sans CJK TC (Traditional)
- Noto Sans JP
- Noto Sans KR

Tibetan:
- Noto Sans Tibetan

African:
- Noto Sans Ethiopic
- Noto Sans Tifinagh

Mixed:
- Reuse appropriate fonts above per script run
